title: stachys iberica var. congesta
intro: Stachys iberica var. congesta, also known as Russian wormwood, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Russian wormwood are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Russian wormwood can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
